lede: This week, YouTube's algorithm favored 8–24 minute videos in Entertainment and Education, with a strong preference for content posted Tuesday morning. Short videos held strong, claiming 14 of the top 50. 44 of the top 50 channels appeared 3+ times — concentration is down week-over-week.
